mapper.sql: id, appeal_id, step_order, approver_id, approver_name, approver_role, approval_status, approval_opinion, approval_time, suggested_score, received_time, timeout_hours, is_timeout, transferred_to, transfer_reason, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM appeal_approval_records WHERE appeal_id = #{appealId} ORDER BY step_order ASC

SELECT
FROM appeal_approval_records WHERE approver_id = #{approverId} AND approval_status = 1 ORDER BY received_time ASC

SELECT
FROM appeal_approval_records WHERE approval_status = 1 AND timeout_hours IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, received_time, NOW()) > timeout_hours AND is_timeout = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO appeal_approval_records (appeal_id, step_order, approver_id, approver_name, approver_role, approval_status, received_time, timeout_hours, is_timeout, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.appealId}, #{item.stepOrder}, #{item.approverId}, #{item.approverName}, #{item.approverRole}, #{item.approvalStatus}, #{item.receivedTime}, #{item.timeoutHours}, #{item.isTimeout}, NOW())
